bio: AI Developer with experience in rule-based audit systems, educational visualizations, UI/UX evaluation, and AI avatars. Skilled in Python, PostgreSQL, Hugging Face, FastAPI, and computer vision. BE AIML Engineering graduate from LoGMIEER College, Nashik.

work_output.description: Developed a rule-based audit system to assess Social Media Marketing (SMM) effectiveness by leveraging computer vision models to detect and analyze web UI elements. Incorporated statistical deviation metrics for competitive branding analysis. Deployed the solution on an AWS EC2 instance using a FastAPI endpoint and integrated a queuing mechanism for scalable performance. Generated educational visualizations by leveraging the initial response from a large language model (LLM) to guide content structure. Created dynamic animations using Manim and supporting data visualizations with Matplotlib, culminating in a cohesive and engaging educational video. Developed a rule-based UI/UX evaluation system leveraging computer vision to analyze design elements and assess consistency in user experiences. Applied prompt engineering strategies in the backend logic to enhance interpretability and adaptability of component assessments. Initially hosted the OmniParser model on Hugging Face via FastAPI for structured content extraction. Deployed the service on AWS Lambda using API Gateway and queuing architecture, with PostgreSQL as the backend database to ensure reliable data management and persistence. Developed a realistic AI avatar for educational videos using the Wav2Lip model, achieving precise lip-sync and expressive facial animations. Deployed the solution via API from a Hugging Face Space, enhancing learner engagement through natural and synchronized visual communication. Designed and developed an agentic AI chatbot using LangGraph , incorporating advanced multi-modal capabilities in text, image, and audio processing. Built a robust API endpoint with FastAPI for seamless integration. Leveraged OpenAI’s LLM for text comprehension, Gemini Vision model for image analysis, and Whisper for audio transcription.

Engineered a real-time AI interviewer featuring a hyper-realistic avatar with 100% accurate lip synchronization using the Wav2Lip model. Integrated ElevenLabs text-to-speech (TTS) to generate expressive, human-like audio responses, enhancing the avatar’s realism and learner engagement. Deployed the solution using Flask and WebSockets for low-latency interaction, hosted via Hugging Face Spaces for easy accessibility and API integration.

Developed a brain tumor detection system using YOLOv10 with90% accuracy in classifying MRI images into Glioma, Meningioma, Pituitary, and No Tumor categories. Integrated an AI chatbot powered by LLMs to deliver detailed medical insights and real-time support for healthcare professionals. Utilized SQLite for securely storing patient information, enhancing accessibility for healthcare professionals and improving diagnostic precision and patient care.

Served as College President andClass Representative (CR) , demonstrating strong leadership, event coordination, and team management skills throughout academic tenure. Led the college Corfball Team asCaptain , representing at the State Level , showcasing discipline, collaboration, and competitive sporting spirit.

professional_development: Complete Machine Learning & NLP Bootcamp – including MLOps and Deployment
other_info: Captain of the college Corfball Team
